languages.text: "С вашего соизволения, Лорд-капитан". {n}Хирургеон Мартинакс изящно кланяется.{/n} "Я немедленно займусь имплантацией. А досточтимый слуга {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} будет мне ассистировать". {n}В скрежещущем бинарном ответе генетора маджорис слышится отчетливое недовольство. Проигнорировав досаду коллеги, вивисектор с филигранной точностью вводит в мозговое вещество пациента тонкие аугментационные штыри, и вскоре железная пластина кортикального импланта с хрустом встает на место поврежденной кости.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Так точно, Лорд-капитан". {n}Человек в перчатках склоняется в поклоне.{/n} "Я справлюсь с установкой. А досточтимый слуга {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} немедленно займется вашим осмотром".
traits.speaker: Vivisector

languages.text: "We hear and obey, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax offers you a graceful bow.{/n} "I will see to the implantation at once. And the esteemed servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will assist me in this procedure." {n}The Genetor Majoris's response in binharic carries a distinct tone of displeasure. Ignoring his colleague's reaction, the Vivisector begins inserting thin augmentation spikes into the patient's brain with uncanny precision. Before long, the iron plate of the cortical implant replaces the damaged bone with a resounding crunch.{/n}

А досточтимый слуга {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} будет мне ассистировать". {n}В скрежещущем бинарном ответе генетора маджорис слышится отчетливое недовольство. Ignoring his colleague's reaction, the Vivisector inserts thin augmentation spikes into the patient's brain with uncanny precision, and before long, the iron plate of the cortical implant replaces the damaged bone with a resounding crunch.{/n}

And the esteemed servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will assist me in this procedure." {n}The Genetor Majoris's response in binharic carries a distinct tone of displeasure. Ignoring his colleague's reaction, the Vivisector begins inserting thin augmentation spikes into the patient's brain with uncanny precision. Before long, the iron plate of the cortical implant replaces the damaged bone with a resounding crunch.{/n}
"Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The gloved man bows to you.{/n} "I will handle the installation. And the esteemed servant of the Omnissiah will attend to your health review immediately."

languages.text: 「はい、ロード・キャプテン。」{n}手袋をはめた男があなたに一礼する。{/n}「取り付けは私が担当します。そして、オムニシアの尊きしもべが、ただちにロード・キャプテンの健康診断に当たります」
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The gloved man bows to you.{/n} "I will handle the installation. And the esteemed servant of the Omnissiah will attend to your health review immediately."

traits.locale_text: 「はい、ロード・キャプテン。」{n}手袋をはめた男があなたに一礼する。{/n}「取り付けは私が担当します。そして、オムニシアの尊きしもべが、ただちにロード・キャプテンの健康診断に当たります。」

languages.text: « À vos ordres, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. {n}Martinax s'incline gracieusement.{/n} Je vais examiner l'implantation de ce pas, et l'honorable serviteur de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} m'assistera dans cette tâche. »{n}Le trille binhaire émis par le vox du genetor majoris traduit son mécontentement. Ignorant la réaction de son collègue, le vivisecteur commence à enfoncer les piques d'augmentation dans le cerveau du patient avec une précision étonnante. Peu de temps après, la plaque de fer de l'implant cortical remplace l'os endommagé dans un craquement retentissant.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We hear and obey, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax offers you a graceful bow.{/n} "I will see to the implantation at once. And the esteemed servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will assist me in this procedure." {n}The Genetor Majoris's response in binharic carries a distinct tone of displeasure. Ignoring his colleague's reaction, the Vivisector begins inserting thin augmentation spikes into the patient's brain with uncanny precision. Before long, the iron plate of the cortical implant replaces the damaged bone with a resounding crunch.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « À vos ordres, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. {n}Martinax s'incline gracieusement.{/n} Je vais examiner l'implantation de ce pas, et l'honorable serviteur de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} m'assistera dans cette tâche. »{n}Le trille binhaire émis par le vox du genetor majoris traduit son mécontentement. Ignorant la réaction de son collègue, le vivisecteur commence à enfoncer les piques d'augmentation dans le cerveau du patient avec une précision étonnante. Peu de temps après, la plaque de fer de l'implant cortical remplace l'os endommagé dans un craquement retentissant.{/n}

languages.text: "Emredersiniz Lord Kaptan." {n}Martinax, önünde zarifçe eğiliyor.{/n} "İmplantasyonla derhâl ilgileneceğim. {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} saygıdeğer hizmetkârı da bu prosedürde bana yardımcı olacak." {n}Genetör Majoris'in ikilidildeki yanıtı bariz bir hoşnutsuzluk tonu taşıyor. Meslektaşının tepkisini görmezden gelen Dirikesimci, ince ogmentasyon çivilerini hastanın beynine tekinsiz bir hassasiyetle yerleştirmeye başlıyor. Çok geçmeden kortikal implantın demir plakası, çınlayan bir çatırtıyla hasarlı kemiğin yerini alıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We hear and obey, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax offers you a graceful bow.{/n} "I will see to the implantation at once. And the esteemed servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will assist me in this procedure." {n}The Genetor Majoris's response in binharic carries a distinct tone of displeasure. Ignoring his colleague's reaction, the Vivisector begins inserting thin augmentation spikes into the patient's brain with uncanny precision. Before long, the iron plate of the cortical implant replaces the damaged bone with a resounding crunch.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Emredersiniz Lord Kaptan." {n}Martinax, önünde zarifçe eğiliyor.{/n} "İmplantasyonla derhâl ilgileneceğim. {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} saygıdeğer hizmetkârı da bu prosedürde bana yardımcı olacak." {n}Genetör Majoris'in ikilidildeki yanıtı bariz bir hoşnutsuzluk tonu taşıyor. Meslektaşının tepkisini görmezden gelen Dirikesimci, ince ogmentasyon çivilerini hastanın beynine tekinsiz bir hassasiyetle yerleştirmeye başlıyor. Çok geçmeden kortikal implantın demir plakası, çınlayan bir çatırtıyla hasarlı kemiğin yerini alıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Wir hören und gehorchen, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax verbeugt sich würdevoll.{/n} "Ich kümmere mich umgehend um die Implantation. Und der geschätzte Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} wird mir assistieren. {n}Der Unmut in der binhärischen Antwort des Genetor Majoris ist nicht zu überhören. Der Vivisektor ignoriert die Reaktion seines Kollegen allerdings und fängt an, mit akribischer Präzision Augmentationsnadeln in das Gehirn des Patienten einzuführen. Wenig später ersetzt die Eisenplatte des Kortikalimplantats knirschend den beschädigten Knochen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We hear and obey, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax offers you a graceful bow.{/n} "I will see to the implantation at once. And the esteemed servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will assist me in this procedure." {n}The Genetor Majoris's response in binharic carries a distinct tone of displeasure. Ignoring his colleague's reaction, the Vivisector begins inserting thin augmentation spikes into the patient's brain with uncanny precision. Before long, the iron plate of the cortical implant replaces the damaged bone with a resounding crunch.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wir hören und gehorchen, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax verbeugt sich würdevoll.{/n} "Ich kümmere mich umgehend um die Implantation. Und der geschätzte Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} wird mir assistieren. {n}Der Unmut in der binhärischen Antwort des Genetor Majoris ist nicht zu überhören. Der Vivisektor ignoriert die Reaktion seines Kollegen allerdings und fängt an, mit akribischer Präzision Augmentationsnadeln in das Gehirn des Patienten einzuführen. Wenig später ersetzt die Eisenplatte des Kortikalimplantats knirschend den beschädigten Knochen.{/n}

languages.text: «Oímos y obedecemos, Lord Capitán». {n}Martinax te dedica una grácil reverencia.{/n} «Me ocuparé inmediatamente de la implantación. El estimado sirviente del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} me ayudará durante el procedimiento». {n}El genetor majoris responde en un binario que transmite su desagrado perfectamente. Ignorando la reacción de su colega, el vivisector empieza a insertar las finas púas de aumento en el cerebro del paciente con una precisión sublime. Al poco tiempo, la placa metálica del implante cortical sustituye el hueso dañado con un crujido sonoro.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We hear and obey, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax offers you a graceful bow.{/n} "I will see to the implantation at once. And the esteemed servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will assist me in this procedure." {n}The Genetor Majoris's response in binharic carries a distinct tone of displeasure. Ignoring his colleague's reaction, the Vivisector begins inserting thin augmentation spikes into the patient's brain with uncanny precision. Before long, the iron plate of the cortical implant replaces the damaged bone with a resounding crunch.{/n}

El estimado sirviente del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} me ayudará durante el procedimiento». {n}El genetor majoris responde en un binario que transmite su desagrado perfectamente. Ignorando la reacción de su colega, el vivisector empieza a insertar las finas púas de aumento en el cerebro del paciente con una precisión sublime. Al poco tiempo, la placa metálica del implante cortical sustituye el hueso dañado con un crujido sonoro.{/n}

languages.text: “遵命，舰长大人。”{n}马丁纳克斯向你优雅地鞠了一躬。{/n}“我将立刻执行植入物手术。这位尊贵的{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}仆从会协助我完成这项操作。”{n}高级基因士的二进制回应中带着明显的不悦。解剖者无视了同僚的反应，开始以不可思议的精度，将细小的植入物尖刺插入病人的大脑。不久，随着一声清脆的咔嚓声，皮层植入物的铁板便取代了损坏的头骨。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We hear and obey, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax offers you a graceful bow.{/n} "I will see to the implantation at once. Ignoring his colleague's reaction, the Vivisector begins inserting thin augmentation spikes into the patient's brain with uncanny precision. Before long, the iron plate of the cortical implant replaces the damaged bone with a resounding crunch.{/n}
